writing.title: Writing Task 2: Describe rules and regulations
writing.prompt: Write a short paragraph (about 40 words) describing rules in society, using Passive Voice + Modal Verbs (must be done/should be done/can be done).
writing.sampleAnswer: Smoking is forbidden in this building. This form must be completed before Friday. These rules should be followed by everyone, and this issue can be solved with clearer signs.
checklist: Dùng modal + be + V3 đúng dạng
Có ít nhất 2 quy định khác nhau
Câu văn rõ ràng, mang tính trang trọng

writing.title: Writing Task 1: Describe statistics
writing.prompt: Write a short paragraph (about 40 words) describing some statistics, using a great deal of/a large number of/the vast majority.
writing.sampleAnswer: A large number of students passed the exam this year. The vast majority of people agree with this policy. About half of the population lives in urban areas.
checklist: Dùng đúng lượng từ với danh từ đếm được/không đếm được
Có ít nhất 1 số liệu cụ thể (half, quarter...)
Văn phong học thuật, phù hợp Writing Task 1
